title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 4.4d
paragraphs: How is this year almost over? Where did all the time go?? But have no fear, we got a banger of an update for you, just in time for the new year.

We have a Ziggs update coming your way that will get your fingers tingling, along with brand new skins, a new event, and of course, your regularly scheduled balance updates. Because of how big this patch is, there are a few champion updates that are coming out slightly later! Welcome to Patch 4.4d!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.
Join our adorable Poros, complete missions, and earn rewards!
The New Year Fluft event begins December 29 at 00:01 UTC
URF is back, tell a friend! Jump on to the Rift and have fun with 0-cost abilities, lots of Ability Haste, and more!
Ultra Rapid Fire Mode (URF) will be available on December 29 at 00:01 UTC
USB will also be back by popular demand!
Ultimate Spell Book (USB) will be available on January 5 at 00:01 UTC
TO THE SKIES! / SHOCK BLAST
To The Skies!(Mercury Cannon)
Shock Blast(Mercury Hammer)

Currently, Maw of Malmortius can only be triggered by attacks, which makes this item incapable of countering mages. We’ve tweaked it to let more champions with physical damage choose this item when they need to counter Mages.
Amaranth’s Twinguard isn’t providing enough stats for players to justify the purchase. We’re increasing the base stats to make it a more attractive item for tanks.
Blood Moon Tryndamere
Releasing January 1 @ 00:01 UTC
Prestige HEARTSTEEL Yone
Releasing January 1 @ 00:01 UTC
Releasing January 4 @ 00:01 UTC
Releasing January 10 @ 00:01 UTC
Releasing January 10 @ 00:01 UTC
Releasing January 10 @ 00:01 UTC

Jade Dragon Wukong will be getting a cosmetic upgrade and leaving the store on December 29 @ 00:01 UTC. He will be available through Poro Chest immediately after. If you have purchased the skin through the store before that time, it will be upgraded automatically.
